summaryForNext: 4 goals, all targeted remediation of last phase's debt. G1 OAuth endpoint auth+rate-limit NOT MET (CRITICAL, first — /oauth/token + /oauth/introspect have zero auth/rate-limit; build_governor_layer + client-creds verifier both exist to reuse). G2 slow-KDF NOT MET (HIGH — unsalted sha256_hex; adopting argon2/bcrypt is the phase's FIRST new crate; verify path refactors from WHERE-hash lookup to fetch-then-KDF-verify). G3 classification edges: api-key->Service NOT MET (build_result leaves kind=User), Kratos act-fallback PARTIAL (flint_kind is safe; gate act on session_id), NHI audit NOT transactional (mirror .begin() at db:834). G4 chained delegation NOT STARTED (actor_token parsed-but-unused; delegate_to_hydra comment-only). Open for analyze: endpoint-auth mechanism; rate-limit backend (governor vs Redis window); argon2 vs bcrypt; actor_token verify-vs-reject.
